ast.name: setText
ast.source:
Your account has been deleted for privacy reasons. If you resubscribe,
					 a new account will be created with a new token that you'll need to use
					 on all your devices.
ast.target: 出于隐私原因，您的账户已被删除。如果您重新订阅，\n\t\t\t\t\t 将使用新令牌创建一个新账户，您需要在所有设备上使用该新令牌。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
This plugin will help you install and manage the beta versions of
			              Vertical Tabs. To get started, please paste your access token below.
ast.target: 此插件将帮助您安装和管理 Vertical Tabs 的测试版。要开始使用，请在下方粘贴您的访问令牌。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Welcome onboard! And thank you for your support!
ast.target: 欢迎加入！感谢您的支持！
